extraction_reasoning: The litigation summary is organized by matters involving the Company, Promoters, Subsidiaries and Directors; it contains no “By” rows, so only the “involving” rows were counted. Criminal proceedings against all listed entities total 0; statutory/regulatory actions against the Company, Promoters, Subsidiaries and Directors total 1 + 3 + 14 + 3 = 21; tax proceedings against the Company and Subsidiaries total 0 + 12 = 12, excluding promoter/director matters and non-quantifiable regulatory amounts. The quantified aggregate against the Company and Subsidiaries is the Subsidiaries’ stated total of ₹353.86 million, comprising ₹39.53 million of material civil litigation and ₹314.33 million of tax proceedings; the Company amount is not quantifiable, so the aggregate is ₹35.386 crore after conversion from millions at ₹10 million per crore. Contingent liabilities use the explicitly stated consolidated Total of ₹120.04 million as of September 30, 2021, converted to ₹12.004 crore; the separate ₹1,850 million corporate guarantee is disclosed but is not included in that stated Total. The section gives geographic/top-state revenue percentages, not company-wide top-customer concentration percentages, and does not disclose the statutory auditor’s opinion status or a going-concern uncertainty.
